decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: scattered — name, title, links placed around the viewport freely
hero_height: full viewport — 100vh with scroll cue below
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
card_style: minimal — no cards, just separated content blocks
scroll_animation: playful — elements slide/bounce in from different directions
hover_effects: moderate — scale, shadow change, color transitions
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
bonus_quirk: include a CSS-only dark/light mode toggle switch
